name: Summit One Bookshelf
short_description: Two-way passive bookshelf speaker designed for stand-mount or bookshelf placement, paired with an external amplifier.
common_issues: Distorted or buzzing sound at higher volumes
Uncertainty about amplifier wattage/impedance matching
Requesting a return after purchase
General questions about placement and specifications

name: Summit One Active
short_description: Powered bookshelf speaker with built-in Wi-Fi streaming, Bluetooth, and companion app setup.
common_issues: Wi-Fi reconnect failures after a firmware update
Bluetooth pairing drops or fails to pair
App setup fails to discover the speaker
Firmware update stuck or fails to install

name: Cedar 200 Integrated Amp
short_description: Integrated stereo amplifier with multiple analog and digital inputs, driving passive speakers.
common_issues: Audible hum or ground loop noise
Uncertainty about which input to use for a given source
Speaker terminal or protection relay seems defective
Registering the amp for warranty coverage

name: Cedar Stream Mini
short_description: Compact network streamer supporting Spotify Connect and AirPlay over a home Wi-Fi network.
common_issues: Spotify Connect or AirPlay fails to discover the device
Network dropout during playback
Billing question about a subscription-linked purchase
General question about supported streaming services

name: AeroDAC 2
short_description: USB and Bluetooth digital-to-analog converter for connecting a computer or phone to an amplifier.
common_issues: USB DAC not recognized by a connected computer
Bluetooth codec or audio quality questions
DAC stopped outputting audio on one channel
Question about which order includes the DAC

name: RidgeSub 8
short_description: Compact 8-inch powered subwoofer with wireless pairing to compatible Summit speakers.
common_issues: Wireless pairing with main speakers fails
Crossover frequency and placement guidance
Box arrived damaged or dented in shipping
Requesting a refund for a subwoofer

name: PeakStand 24
short_description: 24-inch fillable speaker stand pair designed for the Summit One speaker line.
common_issues: Assembly instructions unclear
Compatibility question with a specific speaker model
Missing hardware or parts in the box
Stand arrived with a cracked column

name: RoomTune Mic
short_description: USB measurement microphone used with the companion app to calibrate room acoustics.
common_issues: App fails to recognize the calibration microphone
Calibration process setup guidance
